verdict: Playable with decent rhythmic syncopation, but ruined by lazy charting that uses Left-Right jumps exclusively.

issues.problem: Every single jump in the chart is 'JUMP LR' (Left + Right). There is zero jump variety (no UD, LU, LD, RU, or RD jumps), which makes the physical movement feel extremely repetitive and uncreative.

The rapid transition from U -> JUMP LR -> HOLD U -> JUMP LR in eighth notes (0.24s intervals) is highly asymmetric and awkward, forcing the right foot to execute rapid, jerky movements between R and U while the left foot remains relatively static on L.

The dense eighth-note jump pattern (D -> U -> JUMP LR -> U -> D -> JUMP LR) feels very jerky and cluttered due to the constant forcing of the player back into the wide LR stance immediately after vertical steps.
